zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前AVAX价格围绕6.43窄幅震荡，整体仍处于SMA20下方，短线趋势偏弱整理，反弹动能不足，市场多头信心有限，整体结构偏弱延续。

MACD维持负值区间且动能柱未见明显收敛，短期仍偏空；RSI缺失但结合价格结构，超卖信号尚未确认，反弹需谨慎。需等待方向确认

下方关键支撑位在6.42与6.40附近，一旦跌破或进一步测试6.35；上方阻力集中于6.60及6.65区域，突破需放量确认。短期波动或加剧

操作上建议维持区间思路，短线高抛低吸为主，若放量突破6.60可考虑顺势跟进，否则以观望或轻仓试探为宜。注意风险控制避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is trading around 6.43, hovering just under its 20-day SMA at 6.598, indicating a short-term bearish bias. Price action remains compressed between 6.4222 and 6.4453, showing low volatility and weak directional conviction. The inability to reclaim the moving average suggests sellers maintain control. Overall structure points to a mild downtrend transitioning into consolidation near local lows, with momentum leaning slightly negative.

Momentum indicators reinforce a bearish tilt, with MACD reading at -0.0611 and still below the zero line, signaling sustained downside pressure. Although RSI is not provided, price behavior near the lower end of its recent range typically aligns with neutral-to-weak momentum conditions rather than reversal strength. This suggests buyers have not yet established sufficient demand to challenge resistance zones above.

Immediate support is located near 6.4222, aligning with the current session low, and a breakdown could expose 6.35 as the next downside target. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 6.598 SMA20, followed by stronger resistance around 6.70 where prior supply emerged. Reclaiming these levels would be required to shift short-term structure back toward bullish momentum. Until then, rallies are likely to face selling pressure near resistance zones.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies, with short-term traders potentially fading moves near resistance while targeting support retests. A breakout above 6.60–6.70 would be needed to confirm bullish continuation, while failure to hold 6.42 increases risk of deeper downside expansion. Risk management remains essential given the tight consolidation and lack of strong momentum confirmation. Position sizing should remain conservative until volatility expands and directional confirmation appears.
